$schema_doc: Connector pipeline template — SP14 T-12. Declares MCP calls + write target + processor invocation as DATA, not CODE. Generic — no Peter-isms. Wraps SP13 T-11 ingestor (skills/meeting-note-ingestor-granola) for the processor step. Consumed by connectors/runner.sh + connector-runtime.plist.tmpl when a `connectors[]` entry has default_pipeline_template_id == 'granola-meetings'.

mcp_calls.purpose: List all Granola meetings since the last successful pipeline run (or 24h window for first-run).
mcp_calls.stdout_shape: array of {id, title, date, participants, has_transcript}

mcp_calls.purpose: Per meeting from step 1 with has_transcript=true: fetch the transcript JSON.
mcp_calls.iteration: for each step_1 result with has_transcript=true

schedule_rationale: Daily 06:00 — captures yesterday's meetings before user starts day. Matches Architecture A pattern from R3 §5.
